nasb.text: Every man, who had in his possession blue and purple and scarlet material and fine linen and goats’ hair and rams’ skins dyed red and porpoise skins, brought them.

esv.text: And every one who possessed blue or purple or scarlet yarns or fine linen or goats’ hair or tanned rams’ skins or goatskins brought them.

cnv.text: 凡是有藍色紫色朱紅色線、細麻、山羊毛、染紅的公羊皮、海狗皮的，都送了來。

ccb.text: 凡有细麻线，山羊毛，蓝色、紫色和朱红色的线，染成红色的公羊皮，海狗皮的，都把它们拿来了。
